class.name: race_tracker::PurePursuitController
class.description: A Pure Pursuit controller for lateral control.

class.name: race_tracker::PIDController
class.description: A simple PID controller for longitudinal control.

class.name: race_tracker::NMPCController
class.description: NMPC controller for longitudinal and lateral control for dual axis steering electric vehicle.

class.name: race_tracker::NMPCLateralController
class.description: NMPC controller for lateral control for dual axis steering electric vehicle.

class.name: race_tracker::AntiRolloverController
class.description: Anti-rollover NMPC controller for lateral control of semi-trailer tank truck by predicting and constrainting roll motion.

class.name: race_tracker::NMPCAccelConstController
class.description: Anti-rollover NMPC controller for lateral control by constrainting lateral acceleration in prediction horizon.

class.name: race_tracker::PIDTracker
class.description: PID tracker for lateral control of semi-trailer tank truck.

class.name: race_tracker::ConstThrottleController
class.description: Constant throttle controller for longitudinal control.
